column6:
- Secure File transfer using Alarm.com specific files (custom key) (Available in future FW) 

- Custom keyset for Mobile Access (Mk50008) 

- OEM-key Desfire enabled (Kc1 of Lk50008) and standard WaveLynx MFG key (Ks1 of Lk00001) 

- iClass and ISO15693 reported as 56-bit output (Least significant 7 bytes of CSN Most significant byte of CSN is truncated)

column2: KC1 of LK50008 and Ks1 of LK00001
Ignore all low frequency credentials with W36-8 format, FAC = 7
